values.Author: Dale Carnegie
values.Thoughts: Carnegie in this book sets in my opinion the easiest set of principles to follow. During my life as a college student, this book has been a guiding light when it comes to dealing with all sorts of work.
values.Title: How to Win Friends and Influence People

values.Author: Paulo Coelho
values.Thoughts: This was my 2nd time reading the book, sure enough every re-read seems to reveal a new idea. The book motivated me to persue my dreams harder than ever.
values.Title: The Alchemist

values.Author: James Clear
values.Thoughts: Clear makes it so very clear (yes I did it) the actually practical approach to building habits so easy. The book has allowed me to build habits that are truly making me better every day.
values.Title: Atomic Habits
